slides.HOOK_SUB: Small models are taking over the AI world →
slides.BODY_1_TEXT: Small Language Models (SLMs) like Phi or Llama-3-8B are designed to be efficient. Unlike their giant siblings, they can run on your laptop or even a phone with surprising accuracy.
slides.BODY_2_TEXT: Giant models are expensive and slow. SLMs offer millisecond response times and cost a fraction of the price to run. Perfect for specialized tasks and mobile apps.
slides.BODY_3_TEXT: Because you can run them locally, your data never has to leave your device. This is a game-changer for industries like healthcare and finance where privacy is #1.
slides.CTA_TEXT: I share real-world AI and Data Science lessons every week. Hit follow so you don't miss the next one.
